name: Festival Wide
description: Figures in a crowd or public space of celebration — the environment is festive and alive.
hld_patterns: {setting}. Wide view of a festival, figures immersed in a crowd of celebration.
{setting}. Broad shot of a public celebration, streamers and lights and movement everywhere.
{setting}. Wide establishing view of a festival scene, the whole space alive with collective joy.

background_pool: Town square alive with festival — streamers strung between buildings, lanterns swaying overhead, a crowd filling the cobblestone streets
Open plaza under a night sky lit by fireworks, bunting and flags draped across the facades, throngs of people in motion
Meadow transformed into a festival ground with ribbon-festooned poles, scattered lanterns, and a sea of celebrants under the open sky
action_pool: arms spread wide, head lifted toward the sky
spinning in place, one arm flung outward
both arms raised high, body swaying rhythmically
leaning into the crowd, one arm extended forward
bouncing on the balls of their feet, hands clapping overhead
head tilted back, mouth open, voice raised
one arm wrapped around a neighbor, the other raised high
stepping side to side, hips swinging, grin wide
hands cupped around their mouth, calling outward
whole body launched upward, fists punching the air
